comparisons.title: BMW X5 M60i vs Mercedes-Benz GLE 53 AMG: The 2026 Luxury SUV Benchmark
comparisons.meta_desc: In-depth engineering comparison between BMW X5 and Mercedes GLE. Real-world structural insights, performance data, and value retention analysis.
comparisons.verdict: The BMW X5 excels in powertrain responsiveness and chassis feedback via its 4.4L V8, while the Mercedes GLE provides a slightly higher spatial envelope and softer air-ride isolation for long-distance cruising.

faq.question: What is the certified inspection standard for luxury inventory at YISHU?
faq.answer: Every asset undergoes a mandatory 137-point diagnostic protocol checking structural integrity, thermal signatures of the block, and micro-geometry alignment of the suspension layout.
